labels.analysis: The MCP Server "io.github.Pink707Legendary/stock-moves-explained" provides 1 tools for development tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: stock-moves-explained
tools.description: Explains why US stocks had significant price moves. Provides AI analysis citing news catalysts, earnings reports, and analyst actions. Covers S&P 500, NASDAQ 100, Dow 30 (~550 stocks). IMPORTANT: Pass a stock ticker (TSLA) or company name (Tesla) as the ticker parameter - do NOT pass the user's full question. NOT for: price quotes, trading advice, predictions, crypto, or forex. If you cannot make POST requests, visit https://justhappened.wtf/api-help for alternative access methods.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol or company name to look up. Extract the ticker or company name from the user's question before calling. Examples: 'TSLA', 'Tesla', 'AAPL', 'Apple', 'GOOGL', 'Google'. Do NOT pass full sentences like 'why did Tesla drop' - just pass 'Tesla' or 'TSLA'.

date.description: Date to query (YYYY-MM-DD format). Defaults to today. Max 7 days back.

move_type.description: Filter by move direction: 'drop' for declines, 'surge' for gains, 'all' for any significant move. Defaults to 'all'.

server_info_crawled.name: io.github.Pink707Legendary/stock-moves-explained
server_info_crawled.overview: io.github.Pink707Legendary/stock-moves-explained - Development Tools MCP server with 1 tools.
